honest_issues: The completed wide run contains one failure outside the known set, so the no-new-failures target cannot honestly pass despite the current CVAT module being green.
The five mixed-identity assets intentionally have no proven immutable clean selector and therefore refuse training.
The three manager/report artifacts are ignored by runs/* and require deliberate force-add during integration.
The separate historical inventory and protected-PERSON boundary findings from the review were outside this core dispatch-gate fix.
